# Dane Auto Parts Ltd

> Canada's source for OEM-grade collision and auto body parts. 319,910 SKUs covering vehicles from 1961 to 2026. Ships to Canada, USA, and Mexico.

## Key Pages

- `Home -> https://daneautoparts.com/`: Vehicle Year/Make/Model search, featured products, categories
- `Shop -> https://daneautoparts.com/shop`: Full product catalog with vehicle and product-line filters
- `Categories -> https://daneautoparts.com/categories`: Browse by product line (bumpers, fenders, lamps, doors, etc.)
- `About -> https://daneautoparts.com/about`: Company info, 319,910 parts in catalog, collision/body parts specialty
- `Contact -> https://daneautoparts.com/contact`: Contact form, Ontario Canada location

## Key Facts

- 319,910 auto parts in catalog
- Specializes in collision and body parts
- Vehicle coverage: 1961 to 2026
- Ships to Canada, USA, and Mexico
- Free shipping on orders $75+ CAD
- Secure checkout in CAD via Stripe
- Parts include: head lamps, tail lamps, bumper covers, fenders, hoods, doors, mirrors, grilles, radiators, quarter panels
- OEM-grade quality with Partslink and OEM cross-references
- Based in Ontario, Canada
